name: Bega Cheese Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$5.5898. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.6474 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.5898, stop A$5.2371, target A$5.7800. Risk/reward is 0.54:1.
